cityDNA.coreFantasy: A great-cat forest city where sacred groves, temple platforms, survey yards, guildhalls, manor courts, hunt terraces, and watchful-eye law make predatory grace civic.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Vhal’Tigris is not a jungle cat village; the uploaded images show an ornate forest metropolis with sacred ecology, temple ritual, public works, artisan production, and high residential power.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Vhal’Tigris turns feline vigilance, golden-paw status, sacred groves, temple processions, surveys, craft, and manor hospitality into a civic order of controlled power.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Dense green canopy, golden stone, tiger-stripe accents, turquoise civic lamps, hunt terraces, sacred grove towers, temple platforms, survey halls, guild banners, and manor gardens.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Great-cat beastfolk culture shaped by watchfulness, ritual hunting symbolism, refined craft, territorial stewardship, and formal elite hospitality.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Sunstripes, golden paws, watchful eyes, sacred groves, temple stairs, blue lamps, woven banners, masterwork arcades, and salon gardens symbolize strength held under discipline.

canonLocks: Vhal’Tigris is a mature great-cat beastfolk forest city, not a generic jungle settlement.
The Wonder is Greatcat Sunstripe Hunt Terrace of the Golden Paws.
The Beacon is Sacred Grove Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Watchful Eye Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court.
The five primary districts are Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove, Religious / Temple Quarter, Public Works Authority, Artisan Guilds, and High Residential.

Exact uploaded anchors include Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Sacred Grove Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Living Canopy Hall Nook, Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook, Public Works Authority Hall, Survey Hall, Blue-Lamp Monument, Permit Yard Nook, Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook, High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, and Salon Pavilion Nook.
provisionalCanon: Vhal’Tigris's highest civic virtue is watchful restraint.
rejectedReads: forest scenery without public works or guild life
cautionFlags: Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.
Make feline identity civic, not animal caricature.
Keep sacred, technical, artisan, and elite systems visible together.

environment.environmentalLogic: The forest is territorial and civic; paths, gardens, surveys, and manor courts organize movement through living terrain.

forms: Greatcat Sunstripe Hunt Terrace of the Golden Paws
Watchful Eye Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court
skyline: temple and guild towers within canopy

civilization.people: Great-cat citizens are poised, observant, status-aware, and physically graceful, moving through civic institutions with controlled predatory confidence.
civilization.governance: Watchful Eye Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court governs grove rights, temple duties, public works, guild claims, and manor petitions.
civilization.religion: Sacred grove rites, temple processions, sunstripe hunt symbolism, and golden-paw vows make restraint sacred.

streets.appearance: Lush civic streets run through sacred groves, temple stairs, survey yards, guild arcades, and manor gardens under watchful-eye reliefs and golden-paw monuments.
streets.movement: Movement follows grove routes, procession stairs, survey yards, guild streets, and high residential terraces.
streets.lighting: Golden sunstripe light, blue civic lamps, and deep green shade organize public space.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain deepens canopy color and makes terraces, gardens, and survey routes more prominent.
streets.dayCycle: Grove tending, temple work, surveys, guild craft, and manor errands fill daytime.
streets.nightCycle: Lanterns, salon gatherings, quiet grove watch, and temple rites dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Garden courts, carved eye reliefs, and private shade near manor and registry routes.
housing.middle: Guild, temple, and public works homes along civic forest streets.
housing.poor: Compact service housing near work routes, public basins, and lower markets.

districts.name: Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove
districts.civicPurpose: Sacred ecology, public signal, and territorial stewardship.
districts.visualIdentity: Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Sacred Grove Beacon, Hanging Gardens Monument, Living Canopy Hall Nook.

districts.name: Religious / Temple Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Temple processions, hunt symbolism, and public rites.
districts.visualIdentity: Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook.

districts.name: Public Works Authority
districts.civicPurpose: Surveying, permits, and route maintenance through forest terrain.
districts.visualIdentity: Public Works Authority Hall, Survey Hall, Blue-Lamp Monument, Permit Yard Nook.

districts.name: Artisan Guilds
districts.civicPurpose: Masterwork production, guild legitimacy, and public craft.
districts.visualIdentity: Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook.

districts.name: High Residential
districts.civicPurpose: Elite hospitality, gardened influence, and status display.
districts.visualIdentity: High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook.

wonder.name: Greatcat Sunstripe Hunt Terrace of the Golden Paws
wonder.symbolicRole: Hunt discipline, sunlit status, and great-cat restraint made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Golden terrace wonder above forest canopy and civic courts.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide rites, restraint vows, and hunt-memory ceremonies.
storyHooks: A hunt terrace rite rewards the citizen who does not strike.

beacon.name: Sacred Grove Beacon
beacon.visualRole: Blue signal nested in sacred grove canopy.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates grove, temple, survey, guild, and manor response.
storyHooks: The grove signals before the court admits danger.

seatOfPower.name: Watchful Eye Reliefs Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Observation, status, and law made public authority.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Court with watchful-eye reliefs, terraces, and garden approaches.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Governs grove rights, guild claims, temple duties, and high-house petitions.
storyHooks: An eye relief watches the petitioner no one wanted to hear.

majorLandmarks.name: Temple Platform
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Temple Platform, Religious Temple Quarter Lantern Monument, Procession Stair Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Temple processions, hunt symbolism, and public rites.
storyHooks: A procession pauses where the hunt should have ended.

majorLandmarks.name: Survey Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Survey Hall, Blue-Lamp Monument, Permit Yard Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Surveying, permits, and route maintenance through forest terrain.
storyHooks: A permit map reveals who has been hunting beyond bounds.

majorLandmarks.name: Guildhall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Guildhall, Woven Banners Monument, Masterwork Arcade Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Masterwork production, guild legitimacy, and public craft.
storyHooks: A masterwork shows restraint better than a sermon.

majorLandmarks.name: Manor Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Elite hospitality, gardened influence, and status display.
storyHooks: A salon invitation becomes a territorial challenge.
